utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 items. Each is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (July 1st–5th, 2024), transportation (flight details and cost), accommodation (hotel and cost), activities (two named activities with costs), additional_services (dining with type, category, and cost), and total_budget (580.0). Therefore, all items are covered and detailed as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following elements: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation 'Budget Airlines, Economy class', accommodation 'Backpacker's Base (1-star hotel)', and activities 'City Walking Tour' and 'Street Art Tour'. There is also a dining option described as 'local_specialty'. From the ground-truth ratings: 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 7, 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class' has a rating of 10, 'Backpacker's Base' has a rating of 7, 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9, and 'Street Art Tour' has a rating of 9. For dining 'local_specialty', no explicit entry exists in the ground-truth restaurant list, so it is excluded from the mapped ratings since we only map items with exact matches.
